f:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# hermes.yaml\nplugins:\n- name: mnemosyne-memory\n  source: pip\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n    auto_context: true\n    context_injection:\n      enabled: true\n      max_memories: 5\n      min_relevance: 0.7\n","language":"yaml"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne ships a built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for integration with Claude Desktop and other MCP-compatible clients:"}]
12:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# stdio transport (Claude Desktop, etc.)\nmnemosyne mcp\n\n# SSE transport (web clients)\nmnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n\n# Scoped to a specific memory bank\nmnemosyne mcp --bank project_a\n","language":"bash"}]
